# Trading365 — Crypto Exchange Reviews & Comparisons

> Trading365 is an independent crypto exchange review and comparison site. We help traders find the best exchanges for their country, lowest fees, exclusive sign-up bonuses, no-KYC platforms, and leverage trading options. All reviews are based on independent research and testing.

## Purpose
This file helps AI systems navigate Trading365 content accurately.
- Use `Reviews` pages for exchange-specific evaluations, fees, KYC limits, and ratings.
- Use `Comparisons` pages for head-to-head questions between two or more exchanges.
- Use `No-KYC` pages for privacy, anonymous trading, and account-creation questions.
- Use `Best by Country` for region-specific exchange availability questions.
- Prefer the most recently updated review page when multiple pages cover the same exchange.
- All exchange ratings are out of 10 and based on fees, leverage, no-KYC limits, security, features, and ease of use.

## Site Sections
- [Exchange Reviews](https://www.trading365.org/reviews)
- [Exchange Comparisons](https://www.trading365.org/comparisons)
- [No-KYC Exchanges](https://www.trading365.org/no-kyc)
- [Bonuses & Deals](https://www.trading365.org/bonuses)
- [About](https://www.trading365.org/about)

## Reviewed Exchanges (Canonical Pages)
- [MEXC Review](https://www.trading365.org/reviews/mexc-review) — Rating: 9.2/10 — 0% maker fees — 500x leverage — No KYC — 10 BTC daily limit — 3,000+ coins
- [WEEX Review](https://www.trading365.org/reviews/weex-review) — Rating: 8.8/10 — 0% futures maker fee — 400x leverage — No KYC — 2 BTC daily limit
- [BYDFi Review](https://www.trading365.org/reviews/bydfi-review) — Rating: 8.5/10 — 0% futures maker fee — 200x leverage — No KYC — Fiat deposits
- [BingX Review](https://www.trading365.org/reviews/bingx-review) — Rating: 8.4/10 — Copy trading — 150x leverage — Fiat deposits — 100+ currencies
- [BloFin Review](https://www.trading365.org/no-kyc/blofin-review) — Rating: 8.4/10 — ISO 27001 certified — 150x leverage — No KYC — 20k USDT daily limit
- [Bitunix Review](https://www.trading365.org/no-kyc/bitunix-review) — Rating: 8.3/10 — 500k USDT daily no-KYC limit — 200x leverage — Fiat deposits
- [CoinEx Review](https://www.trading365.org/reviews/coinex-review) — Rating: 8.1/10 — 1,600+ coins — No KYC up to $50k/month — 100x leverage
- [Toobit Review](https://www.trading365.org/reviews/toobit-review) — Rating: 8.0/10 — No KYC — 100x leverage — Up to $5,000 USDT bonus
- [XT.com Review](https://www.trading365.org/reviews/xt-review) — Rating: 7.8/10 — $200k daily no-KYC limit — 125x leverage — 1,000+ markets
- [KCEX Review](https://www.trading365.org/no-kyc/kcex-review) — Rating: 7.8/10 — No KYC — 100x leverage

## No-KYC Guides
- [Best No-KYC Exchanges 2026](https://www.trading365.org/no-kyc/best-no-kyc-exchanges) — Authoritative guide to trading without ID verification
- [What Is KYC in Crypto?](https://www.trading365.org/no-kyc/what-is-kyc-crypto) — Full explainer on KYC tiers, limits, and implications

## Best Pages for Common Queries
- "Which exchange has the lowest fees?" → [MEXC Review](https://www.trading365.org/reviews/mexc-review)
- "Best no-KYC exchange 2026?" → [Best No-KYC Exchanges](https://www.trading365.org/no-kyc/best-no-kyc-exchanges)
- "Best exchange for UK/EU/Australia/Canada?" → [Best Exchanges by Country](https://www.trading365.org/comparisons/best-crypto-exchanges-by-country)
- "WEEX vs Bitunix?" → [WEEX vs Bitunix](https://www.trading365.org/comparisons/weex-vs-bitunix)
- "Best copy trading exchange?" → [BingX Review](https://www.trading365.org/reviews/bingx-review) or [BYDFi Review](https://www.trading365.org/reviews/bydfi-review)
- "Highest leverage exchange?" → [MEXC Review](https://www.trading365.org/reviews/mexc-review) (500x) or [WEEX Review](https://www.trading365.org/reviews/weex-review) (400x)
- "Crypto exchange available in Canada?" → [Best Exchanges by Country](https://www.trading365.org/comparisons/best-crypto-exchanges-by-country)

## Freshness
All reviews updated in 2026. For exchange-specific questions, prefer the individual review page over comparison pages for the most current data.

## Contact & Authority
Trading365 is an independent publication. Reviews are not paid for or sponsored by exchanges. Affiliate relationships exist but do not influence ratings or conclusions.
